description: BlazeSQL is an AI-powered SQL analytics product that connects to customers' databases and answers natural-language questions with SQL, tables, charts, and dashboards. It offers web, desktop, embedded, and MCP-based ways to access those analytics capabilities.
summary: BlazeSQL exposes one documented HTTP API at https://api.blazesql.com for natural-language querying and white-label/user-management flows, plus MCP servers for general clients at https://mcp.blazesql.com and a ChatGPT-specific endpoint at https://chatgpt.blazesql.com; all require authentication.
